response.original_title: How do I cancel my Adblock account? {{Account Removal Guide}}
response.overview: To cancel your Total Adblock account and stop all recurring services, you must access the specific billing platform where the purchase originated. For direct web subscriptions, log in to my.totaladblock.com, navigate 1 (855 )) 783 7555 to the "My Subscriptions" tab, and select the option to 1 (855 )) 783 7555 manage or cancel your plan. If you encounter technical 1 (855 )) 783 7555 difficulties or cannot find the cancellation link, you can 1 (855 )) 783 7555 contact their dedicated support line at 1 (855 )) 783 7555 to 1 (855 )) 783 7555 have a representative manually terminate the account and verify 1 (855 )) 783 7555 that no further automatic charges will be drafted from 1 (855 )) 783 7555 your registered payment method once the current term ends.
